title: Brigade Group Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Brigade Group Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group Ventures Solutions:
Brigade Group Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group Ventures Solutions!
